arts.ttl: Sean Dyche spells out difference Jarrad Branthwaite will make for beleaguered Everton
arts.sum: Jarrad Branthwaite is fit after his groin operation and ready to return for beleaguered Everton who have just one point from their first five Premier League games

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace boss Glasner hopes Jean-Philippe Mateta can achieve desire of playing for France’s senior side
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner says he will cross his fingers that Jean-Philippe Mateta wins his first call-up to France’s senior side and can see the Crystal Palace striker’s ‘desire’ to play for his national team. Mateta was a key player for Thierry Henry during this summer’s Olympic Games, scoring five goals in six games to earn a silver medal for France.

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche drops major Jarrad Branthwaite Everton selection hint for Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Sean Dyche has been speaking about Jarrad Branthwaite's return to fitness ahead of Everton's game with Crystal Palace
Ahead of Palace’s trip to face Everton, manager Oliver Glasner reflected on how much he has learned since he was last at Goodison Park - a few days before he took charge of the club.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid to turn their attention to Everton after being priced out of Spurs ‘winner’
arts.sum: Real Madrid have become aware that it would take a ‘colossal fee’ to persuade Tottenham Hotspur to sell centre-back Cristian Romero, according to reports. Romero has firmly established himself as one of the world’s top centre-backs in recent years with Spurs.
